suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update shared modal implementation guidance (especially fullstack-worker) to explicitly require Tab/Shift+Tab focus trap and focus restoration when modal parity/accessibility is required.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The original swap-confirmation-modal failed review due to missing focus trap, and the fix review again identified this as an under-specified skill guidance gap.

rejectedObservations.observation: Re-apply previously suggested skill updates for non-UI verification exemptions and stricter TDD wording.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-captured-in-previous-round: these recommendations were documented in round 1 and were not newly introduced by this re-run fix review.
